base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of general_effects — a effect_layer (aura_vfx) from 1994 darkstalkers. Hit-sparks + ES-super flash + chain-combo bursts. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
